options.name: --input
options.description:
CLEF file to read; if not specified, STDIN will
be used

options.name: --out-file
options.description:
Output file; if no output is specified, STDOUT
will be used

options.name: --property
options.description:
Enrich events with additional properties, e.g. -p
Customer=C123 -p Environment=Production
--filter=VALUE         Filter expression to select a subset of events
--format-json          Format output as CLEF JSON
--format-template=VALUE
Specify an output template to control plain text
--out-seq=VALUE        Send output to Seq at the specified URL
--out-seq-apikey=VALUE Specify the API key to use when writing to Seq,
if required
--out-seq-batchpostinglimit=VALUE
The maximum number of events to post in a single
--out-seq-eventbodylimitbytes=VALUE
The maximum size, in bytes, that the JSON
representation of an event may take before it
is dropped rather than being sent to the Seq
--invalid-data=VALUE   Specify how invalid data is handled: fail (
default), ignore, or report
